name: xkin
description: Browser-ready bundles for Monaco Editor, Babel, Prettier, SASS, CSSO, Terser & Showdown

scripts.build: npm run build:tools && npm run build:styles && npm run build:engine && npm run build:editor && npm run build:main && npm run build:types
scripts.build:engine: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 webpack --config webpack.config.mjs --config-name engine --mode production
scripts.build:main: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 webpack --config webpack.config.mjs --config-name main --mode production
scripts.build:editor: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 webpack --config webpack.config.mjs --config-name editor --mode production
scripts.build:tools: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 webpack --config webpack.config.mjs --config-name tools --mode production
scripts.build:styles: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 webpack --config webpack.config.mjs --config-name styles --mode production

author: hlop3z
